markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX Labs and Conductor for content creation and optimization services.](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers a comprehensive content engine as a service, combining AI and expert human editors to create, refresh, and optimize content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [The company uses proprietary AI-powered workflows and a team of experienced managing directors to deliver high-quality content and SEO results](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Conductor team sees potential in leveraging GrowthX Labs' services to optimize existing content and create new content to improve search rankings and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Labs Background and Approach

  - [Founded by Bruno Santilli, who has experience building successful content programs at IBM, HP, HashiCorp, and Scale AI](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Uses a first-principles approach to content creation: understanding audience needs, analyzing existing content, identifying gaps, and executing strategically](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Combines AI-powered workflows with expert human editors to scale content production while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Offers a full-service solution, including content strategy, creation, optimization, design, and distribution](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Technology and Workflow

  - [Utilizes AI coding agents to create and run complex workflows for content research, creation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Workflows include deep research processes, using multiple APIs and vetting sources for accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Parallel processing and vector databases are used to efficiently handle large amounts of information](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Custom workflows can be created and adapted based on client needs and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Team Structure and Expertise

  - [VC-funded company with separate build (engineering, product, design) and delivery teams](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Delivery team led by former TechCrunch editor-in-chief, with managing directors from companies like G2, Fanatics, and NerdWallet](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Production assistants and content managers handle repetitive tasks, freeing up editors for higher-level work](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Engagement Process

  - [12-week initial engagement to shape strategy and calibrate content quality](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [By week 3-4, aligned on content strategy and publishing calibrated content](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Weekly learning and iteration based on performance signals](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Aim to be an extension of the client's team, with a "best hire mindset"](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### Potential Benefits for Conductor

  - [Opportunity to optimize and enrich existing content (744 pages mentioned)](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Create new content to improve AI search rankings and domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Repurpose and expand current content assets](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Develop content clusters and programmatic pages for specific topics or categories](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)

### Implementation and Collaboration

  - [GrowthX Labs can be granted CMS access for direct content updates](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Shared Slack channel and Notion workspace for communication and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Weekly 30-minute meetings and daily async updates](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Flexible approach to prioritizing content refresh vs. new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review GrowthX Labs' proposal and services in more detail](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [Discuss potential areas for content optimization and creation within Conductor's existing assets](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Evaluate the possibility of granting CMS access and integrating GrowthX Labs into Conductor's workflow](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Consider scheduling a follow-up meeting to discuss specific content strategies and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/j2zkJWYvWHGUTt_mG7kJmUf9xoHxztui?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
